choices: You see hooded figures staring at you.
1.content: As a depressed teenager you take a walk in the park at night but all of a sudden a bright light shows up in front of you and you blackout. Once you wake up you see yourself laying on something and you look up to see....
1.title: Abduction

11.content:
You aren't sure what happened but you do know your not walking in the park anymore. You seem to be lying down on some giant cushion that is surrounded by mysterious hooded figures.

You start to shake uncontrollably in fear for your life of what these figures have planned for you until removes their hood and reveals itself as a female anthropomorphic Salazzle who gives you a warming and comforting smile to help with your shaking. After the female Salazzle reveals herself, all the other hooded figures reveals themselves to you which all turn out to be females.

Salazzle: https://www.furaffinity.net/view/3940053...

The female Salazzle walks forward kneeling down to make herself less intimidating as you stare at her shaking even harder.

"Welcome Human to your new home!"

What will you do?
11.title: You see hooded figures staring at you.

info.brief_description: You have been abducted by furries and they find Humans cute.
info.description:
You are a 16 year old high school student with good grades and plays sports but recently your mother and father passed away from a fatal car accident and with no family members to take care of you, you are left as a orphan. Life has been hard on you ever since your parents passed away and you have been struggling with depression, and to cope with your depression you like to go on walks out in the park. But one night when you were walking in the park a strange light appears in front of you and you blackout. You have now been abducted by female furries who dominate their world and now all of them find you and humans cute. Because of how furries find you cute everyone of them wants to adopt you as their mother. It's up to you to choose who will be your new mother.

Rules:

-Vore of the main character. (this would include oral, breast, anal, or unbirth.)
-Death of the main character is not allowed. (digestion/absorption of the main character is allowed but it has to be painless and they have to be reformed.)
-Diaper usage is not allowed.
-Any abuse towards the main character is not allowed.
-No unloving or abusive characters towards the main character. (Voring them for long periods of time for torture is not allowed but using it as punishment is fine.)
-No gender swap.
-No cock vore.
-Not letting the main character gain a mother.
-Including graphic digestion is allowed.
-No loopholes of the main character being vored.

As the story changes in the future so will the rules so make sure to check them once in a while. If these rules are not followed, the chapter you added will be deleted. Have fun.
